pr.title: Non-record: TernaryRecurrentGPT - ternary 1.58-bit MLP + depth recurrence (1xL4 val_bpb=1.5348)

output.summary: Depth-recurrent GPT looping 7 layers twice with SmearGate+BigramHash and late STE-based 1.58-bit ternary MLP weights plus SWA-enhanced Muon+AdamW.
output.valOnlyReasoning: PR describes standard training with validation checks, not a val-only regime.
techniques: 14-layer effective depth via two loops over 7 layers
Late-stage STE QAT for 1.58-bit ternary MLP weights
Muon+AdamW optimizer with SWA starting at 40%
